outputs.accepted_verification_result_packet: Public-safe result packet for scope scope:interface-smoke-public. Policy applied: accept only rows with scoped result artifact and acceptance basis; blocked or inconclusive rows remain explicit. Upstream references are recorded read-only and not mutated.
outputs.result_summary: Fixture contains 2 result artifact refs: 1 accepted pass row and 1 blocked inconclusive row. No private runtime facts or unstated owner approvals are claimed.
outputs.accepted_result_rows: Accepted rows: VR-001; verdict=pass; basis=public synthetic smoke log ref; acceptance=accepted; scope=scope:interface-smoke-public.
outputs.blocked_or_inconclusive_rows: Blocked or inconclusive rows: VR-002; verdict=inconclusive; basis=missing measurement artifact; acceptance=blocked; required follow-up is a scoped measurement artifact or explicit owner decision before acceptance can be claimed.
outputs.acceptance_provenance: Acceptance basis comes only from fixture result_artifact_refs and approved_result_acceptance_policy. Verification plan reference plan:interface-contract-v0 is recorded as read-only optional alignment context.
outputs.boundary_review_note: Public-safe synthetic fixture only. No secret, credential, customer, production log, or private project fact is included. Upstream artifacts are treated as read-only references. This packet records acceptance status within the provided scope only and does not replace source authority.

provenance: Workflow contract: accepted_verification_result_packet_v0 owns result_scope_identity, accepted_result_row_identity, acceptance_provenance, and result_summary.
Fixture acceptance policy: accept only rows with scoped result artifact and acceptance basis; blocked or inconclusive rows remain explicit.
Fixture result artifact VR-001: verdict pass, basis public synthetic smoke log ref, acceptance accepted.
Fixture result artifact VR-002: verdict inconclusive, basis missing measurement artifact, acceptance blocked.
Optional verification plan ref: plan:interface-contract-v0, read-only alignment context.
gaps: Missing measurement artifact for VR-002 prevents accepted-row claim.
No owner_decision_refs were provided; no owner acceptance beyond fixture policy is claimed.
No trace_matrix_refs were provided; trace completeness is not assessed.
No raw execution artifacts were provided beyond public synthetic result refs; runtime truth is not independently verified.
downstream_handoff: For functional_configuration_audit_page_library_v0: consume accepted_result_rows containing VR-001 and result_summary noting 1 accepted pass and 1 blocked inconclusive result.
For review_gate_evidence_pack_v0: include result_summary, acceptance_provenance, and blocked row VR-002 with follow-up need for measurement artifact or owner decision.

Owner/action follow-up: provide scoped measurement artifact for VR-002 or record an explicit owner decision if the blocked row should remain waived, deferred, or accepted under a separate approved basis.
boundary_review_note: Public boundary: content is synthetic and public-safe; no private identifiers or logs are introduced.
Secret boundary: no credentials, tokens, customer data, or production-only evidence are present or inferred.
Upstream mutation boundary: verification plan refs and result artifact refs are read-only; this packet does not edit, replace, or reinterpret upstream source authority.
Acceptance boundary: only VR-001 is accepted because the fixture explicitly marks it accepted with a basis; VR-002 remains blocked because its measurement artifact is missing.
no_claims: Does not claim production verification occurred.
Does not claim VR-002 passed or was accepted.
Does not claim trace matrix completeness.
Does not claim owner acceptance beyond the provided approved_result_acceptance_policy.
Does not mutate, correct, or supersede upstream verification plans, result artifacts, or source packets.
Does not introduce private project facts, customer names, credentials, raw logs, or unstated approvals.
